children.heading: Notice and hearing
children.label: a Notice and hearing
children.text: Upon receipt of a complaint filed under , the Secretary shall convene an ad hoc arbitration panel as provided in subsection (b). Such panel shall, in accordance with the provisions of subchapter II of chapter 5 of title 5, give notice, conduct a hearing, and render its decision which shall be subject to appeal and review as a final agency action for purposes of chapter 7 of such title 5.section 107d–1 of this title

children.heading: Composition of panel; designation of chairman; termination of violations
children.label: b Composition of panel; designation of chairman; termination of violations
A
children.text: one individual designated by the State licensing agency;

children.label: B
children.text: one individual designated by the blind licensee; and

children.label: C
children.text: one individual, not employed by the State licensing agency or, where appropriate, its parent agency, who shall serve as chairman, jointly designated by the members appointed under subparagraphs (A) and (B).

children.label: A
children.text: one individual, designated by the State licensing agency;

children.label: B
children.text: one individual, designated by the head of the Federal department, agency, or instrumentality controlling the Federal property over which the dispute arose; and

children.label: C
children.text: one individual, not employed by the Federal department, agency, or instrumentality controlling the Federal property over which the dispute arose, who shall serve as chairman, jointly designated by the members appointed under subparagraphs (A) and (B).

children.heading: Publication of decisions in Federal Register
children.label: c Publication of decisions in Federal Register
children.text: The decisions of a panel convened by the Secretary pursuant to this section shall be matters of public record and shall be published in the Federal Register.

children.heading: Payment of costs by the Secretary
children.label: d Payment of costs by the Secretary
children.text: The Secretary shall pay all reasonable costs of arbitration under this section in accordance with a schedule of fees and expenses he shall publish in the Federal Register.
